disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Inside an African lab that helped crack the hantavirus outbreak - Reuters
updates.body_en: Inside an African lab that helped crack the hantavirus outbreak Reuters
updates.summary_zh: 路透社报道非洲实验室协助破解汉坦病毒疫情。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus outbreak: How an African lab contributed to the scientific breakthrough - The Economic Times
updates.body_en: Hantavirus outbreak: How an African lab contributed to the scientific breakthrough The Economic Times
updates.summary_zh: 经济时报报道非洲实验室对汉坦病毒科学突破的贡献。

updates.title_en: WHO Health Emergencies EPI-WIN webinar: Hantavirus in Focus II: hantavirus in an international maritime setting: natural history, infection control and clinical management of patients in hospital - World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.body_en: WHO Health Emergencies EPI-WIN webinar: Hantavirus in Focus II: hantavirus in an international maritime setting: natural history, infection control and clinical management of patients in hospital World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.summary_zh: WHO举办汉坦病毒网络研讨会，聚焦国际海事环境。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cruise ship quarantine orders are based on a disease list that doesn’t include hantavirus - Healthbeat
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cruise ship quarantine orders are based on a disease list that doesn’t include hantavirus Healthbeat
updates.summary_zh: 邮轮隔离令依据的疾病清单未包含汉坦病毒。

updates.title_en: ‘Shocking number’ of PNW rodents may carry hantavirus, Scientific American says - OregonLive.com
updates.body_en: ‘Shocking number’ of PNW rodents may carry hantavirus, Scientific American says OregonLive.com
updates.summary_zh: 科学美国人称太平洋西北地区大量啮齿动物携带汉坦病毒。

updates.title_en: Study finds deadly hantavirus more widespread in Pacific Northwest rodents than expected - KOMO
updates.body_en: Study finds deadly hantavirus more widespread in Pacific Northwest rodents than expected KOMO
updates.summary_zh: 研究：太平洋西北地区啮齿动物汉坦病毒携带率高于预期。

updates.title_en: American passenger feels 'betrayed' by federal order to stay in hantavirus quarantine - NPR
updates.body_en: American passenger feels 'betrayed' by federal order to stay in hantavirus quarantine NPR
updates.summary_zh: 美国乘客因联邦汉坦病毒隔离令感到被背叛。

updates.title_en: Ebola and hantavirus outbreaks highlight need for global pandemic preparedness, says virologist - University of Alberta
updates.body_en: Ebola and hantavirus outbreaks highlight need for global pandemic preparedness, says virologist University of Alberta
updates.summary_zh: 病毒学家称埃博拉和汉坦疫情凸显全球大流行防范需求。

updates.title_en: 2 Americans forced into quarantine following deadly cruise ship hantavirus outbreak - NPR
updates.body_en: 2 Americans forced into quarantine following deadly cruise ship hantavirus outbreak NPR
updates.summary_zh: 两名美国人因邮轮汉坦病毒爆发被强制隔离。

updates.title_en: US curbs on travelers exposed to deadly viruses may infringe rights and deter volunteers - The Guardian
updates.body_en: US curbs on travelers exposed to deadly viruses may infringe rights and deter volunteers The Guardian
updates.summary_zh: 美国对接触致命病毒旅行者的限制可能侵犯权利。

updates.title_en: WSU study finds high prevalence of hantavirus in some parts of Pacific Northwest - WSU Insider
updates.body_en: WSU study finds high prevalence of hantavirus in some parts of Pacific Northwest WSU Insider
updates.summary_zh: 华盛顿州立大学研究发现美国西北部部分地区汉坦病毒高流行。

updates.title_en: Scientists to monitor British cruise passengers in hantavirus study - The Telegraph
updates.body_en: Scientists to monitor British cruise passengers in hantavirus study The Telegraph
updates.summary_zh: 科学家将监测英国邮轮乘客进行汉坦病毒研究。

updates.title_en: N.Y. man who was on hantavirus cruise ship says Nebraska isolation center feels like ‘prison’ - NBC News
updates.body_en: N.Y. man who was on hantavirus cruise ship says Nebraska isolation center feels like ‘prison’ NBC News
updates.summary_zh: 纽约男子称内布拉斯加隔离中心像监狱。
